name: Peach Torte
recipeIngredient: 1 Pkg Yellow Or White Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Place the peaches with juice in a greased and floured 9x13-inch pan.
3. Sprinkle the cake mix over the top of the peaches.
4. Sprinkle the nuts mixed with coconut and brown sugar on top.
5. Drizzle the melted butter over all.
6. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until done.
7. Serve with Cool Whip or ice cream when cool.
